query:
SELECT externalId, description, parsedSpeedTier, parsedContractMonths, parsedHardwareStatus, parsedHas4gBackup, parsedDataAllowance
FROM billing_items 
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%'
AND (parsedSpeedTier IS NOT NULL AND parsedSpeedTier != '' OR parsedContractMonths IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT externalId, description, parsedSpeedTier, parsedContractMonths, parsedHardwareStatus, parsedHas4gBackup, parsedDataAllowance
FROM billing_items 
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%'
AND (parsedSpeedTier IS NOT NULL AND parsedSpeedTier != '' OR parsedContractMonths IS NOT NULL)
LIMIT 5;
